member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureContainerRegistryExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding Azure Container Registry resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureContainerRegistryExtensions.AddAzureContainerRegistry(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Container Registry resource to the application model.
member.param: The builder for the distributed application.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureContainerRegistryExtensions.SubscribeToAddRegistryTargetAnnotations(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource)
member.summary: Subscribes to BeforeStartEvent to add RegistryTargetAnnotation to all resources in the model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureContainerRegistryExtensions.WithAzureContainerRegistry``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource})
member.summary: Configures a resource that implements to use the specified Azure Container Registry.
member.param: The resource builder for a resource that implements .
The resource builder for the to use.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureContainerRegistryExtensions.WithRoleAssignments``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource},Azure.Provisioning.ContainerRegistry.ContainerRegistryBuiltInRole[])
member.summary: Adds role assignments to the specified Azure Container Registry resource.
member.typeparam: The type of the resource being configured.
member.param: The resource builder for the resource that will have role assignments.
The target Azure Container Registry resource.
The roles to assign to the resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryHelpers
member.summary: Helper methods for Azure Container Registry operations.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Container Registry resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The callback to configure the Azure infrastructure for this resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: The name of the Azure Container Registry.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureContainerRegistryResource.RegistryEndpoint
member.summary: The endpoint of the Azure Container Registry.
